title: Dataset of AL1-ASPEX-STEPS used for 'One Year of ASPEX-STEPS Operation: Characteristic Features, Observations and Science Potential' paper
author: Sebastian, Jacob
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The plots presented in the paper  "One Year of ASPEX-STEPS Operation: Characteristic Features, Observations and Science Potential"  were generated using the data provided on this page. The files include housekeeping parameter data, calibration pulse data, observations during STEPS-SR and STEPS-SP rotations, and Level-1a data from a portion of the Payload Verification phase (8th January 2024 to 10th May 2024). Data from 11th May 2024 onward is available through ISRO’s Science Data Archive, PRADAN:  https://pradan.issdc.gov.in/ .
